category_sources: Official rszyma/kanata-tray repository is for the Kanata Tray project.

repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/rszyma/kanata-tray, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official repository identity ties it directly to Kanata desktop/tray management.
